QFAU.title: Song QFAU

lyrics.label: Verse
lyrics.text: Midnight in the moss Your shadow learns to bloom Fern leaves hold their breath Under a silver moon The river turns to glass And bends around our feet I can hear the roots Knocking in a sleep Stay a little longer Let the night unfold Every little heartbeat We are now at the University of Minnesota The heartbeat turns the dark to gold Moonlit moss pull me close Moonlit moss, don't let go Under the trees I drift and glow Moonlit moss, take me home Fireflies in the grass, right circles in the air Bare hands on the bark like a prayer laid there The wind tastes like rain on a forgotten road You smile like a secret I already know Stay a little longer let the night unfold Every little heartbeat turns the dark to gold Moonlit moss, pull me close Moonlit moss, don't let go Under the trees I drift and glow Moonlit moss, take me home Moonlit moss Take me home I was lost in the noise You were green in the black Now the whole wide world Leans and calls me back Moonlit moss pull me close Moonlit moss, don't let go Under the trees I drift and glow Moonlit moss, take me home Moonlit moss, pull me close Moonlit moss, don't let go Under the trees I drift and glow Moonlit moss, take me home Take me home

NXET.title: Song NXET

lyrics.label: Verse
lyrics.text: I Climbed with a split-lip grin Mud on my boots again The ridge kept asking my name I said I came to break your chain Stone face cold wind stare Hands up I don't care Your old fear can't stay here I left it low, I left it rear Hear that hush on the edge of the pine It hits like thunder then it shines I burn, I bend, I don't confess I found my calm in the wreck Black Mountain, take me in Black Mountain, peace within I rebel, I rise, I breathe again Black Mountain, peace within Peace within Peace within No gold crown, no holy hall Just a crack in the shale wall I traced my pulse in the stone And heard my wild heart home The sky wore bruises of blue The river could glean through I laughed at the weight I wore Then laid it down on the floor Hear that hush on the edge of the pine It hits like thunder, then it shines I burn, I bend, I don't confess I found my calm in the wreck Black Mountain, take me in Black Mountain, peace within I'll blow, I'll rise, I'll breathe again Black Mountain, peace within Peace within Peace within Let the old storm call my name I won't kneel to the same old flame I learned the hard way, iron and stone Peace is a place I make my own Black Mountain, take me in Black Mountain, peace within I build, I rise, I breathe again Black Mountain, peace within Peace within Peace within I'm out.

lyrics.label: Verse
lyrics.text: I Climbed with a split-lip grin Mud on my boots again The ridge kept asking my name I said I came to break your chain Stone face cold wind stare Hands up I don't care Your old fear can't stay here I left it low, I left it rear Hear that hush on the edge of the pine It hits like thunder then it shines I burn, I bend, I don't confess I found my calm in the wreck Black Mountain, take me in Black Mountain, peace within I rebel, I rise, I breathe again Black Mountain, peace within Peace within Peace within No gold crown, no holy hall Just a crack in the shale wall I traced my pulse in the stone And heard my wild heart home The sky wore bruises of blue The river could glean through I laughed at the weight I wore Then laid it down on the floor Hear that hush on the edge of the pine It hits like thunder, then it shines I burn, I bend, I don't confess I found my calm in the wreck Black Mountain, take me in Black Mountain, peace within I'll blow, I'll rise, I'll breathe again Black Mountain, peace within Peace within Peace within Let the old storm call my name I won't kneel to the same old flame I learned the hard way, iron and stone Peace is a place I make my own Black Mountain, take me in Black Mountain, peace within I build, I rise, I breathe again Black Mountain, peace within Peace within Peace within I'm out.

productionNotes: Keep transitions clean and loop-friendly.
